system-purpose.primary-goal: Automate legal fee management and lawyer remuneration calculations for a single law firm
system-purpose.target-users: Law firm specializing in Social Security Law (Direito Previdenciário)
system-purpose.current-problem: Manual calculations prone to human error, lack of indexed records, privacy risks
system-purpose.language: UI in Portuguese (pt-BR), codebase in English

success-metrics.metric: Provide audit trail for all changes

backend.api: tRPC (with TanStack Query for server/client procedures)

role.name: Admin
role.permissions: Full CRUD, remuneration management, reports, audit logs

role.name: User
role.permissions: View own data, basic CRUD operations

authentication-requirements.requirement: Login with email or OAB number and password (BetterAuth)
Rate limiting: 5 login attempts per minute
OAB number validation (RS000000 format) for lawyers only

field.name: email
field.description: Used for login and BetterAuth compatibility

field.name: cnpjf
field.description: CPF for PF, CNPJ for PJ

validation.rule: At least one contact method required for clients (email or phone)
Down payment cannot exceed total value

data-integrity.rule: Audit log for all CRUD operations
Cannot hard delete clients with contracts
Cannot hard delete contracts with fees
Contract status changes based on payment completion

type.name: Responsible
type.description: Lawyer with full responsibility for the contract

type.name: Recommending
type.description: Lawyer who referred the case (receives referrer percentage)

type.name: Recommended
type.description: Lawyer assigned to handle a referred case (receives reduced percentage)

type.name: Additional
type.description: Employee receiving fixed 10% remuneration (only for social_security contracts)

type.name: Admin Assistant
type.description: Administrative assistant helping with the contract

relationship-rules.rule: One contract can have multiple employees

revenue-fee-hierarchy.structure: Contract (Main Entity) └── Revenue (Payment Configuration) └── Fee (Actual Payment) └── Remuneration (Employee Payment)

attribution-types.type: Contract relationship - fixed 10% (only for social_security contracts)

automatic-remuneration-generation.trigger: Triggered when fee is created with generateRemuneration: true

process.step: Creates remuneration records based on contract-employee relationships
Updates existing remunerations when fee is modified
Soft deletes remunerations when fee is soft deleted
Additional relationship type only valid for social_security contracts
Checks for contract completion when all revenues are paid

dashboard-layout.component: Navigation menu with icons and labels
Top of page for success/error messages

screen.name: Login
screen.validation: Form validation with Portuguese error messages

client-form-modal.field: Tipo de Cliente radio buttons (Pessoa Física/Jurídica)

component-usage.rule: Entity Details: Display in Drawer component (not separate pages)
Forms: Display in Modal component (not separate pages)
Notifications: Sonner toast at top of page
Data Tables: With sorting and filtering capabilities

responsive-design.principle: Mobile First: Optimized for mobile devices

field.name: password
field.validation: string().min(6, 'Senha deve ter no mínimo 6 caracteres')

refine.message: Pelo menos um contato é obrigatório

field.name: employees
field.validation: array(object({employeeId: string().uuid(), type: enum(['responsible', 'recommending', 'recommended', 'admin_assistant'])})).min(1, 'Pelo menos um responsável é obrigatório')

field.name: installmentsTotal
field.validation: number().int().positive('Número de parcelas deve ser positivo')

refine.message: Entrada não pode exceder o valor total

field.name: installmentNumber
field.validation: number().int().positive('Número da parcela deve ser positivo')

error-messages-portuguese.message: Erro ao acessar banco de dados

initial-setup.command: npx shadcn-ui@latest add button card dialog drawer form input label select table toast sonner

test-suite.name: Contract Status
test-suite.test: Contract status updates when fully paid
Contract remains active when partially paid

indexes.index: CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_table_record ON audit_logs(table_name, record_id);

composite-indexes.index: CREATE INDEX idx_contracts_area_status ON contracts(legal_area, contract_status);
CREATE INDEX idx_remunerations_employee_date ON remunerations(employee_id, payment_date);

frontend-optimization.lazy-loading: Modals and drawers load on demand

authentication-authorization.role-verification: Server-side role checking on all routes
authentication-authorization.api-protection: All routes require authentication except login

privacy-compliance.data-isolation: Users see only their remuneration data

deployment-platforms.platform: docker build -t hono-legal . && docker run -p 3000:3000 hono-legal

phase.feature: Email Notifications: Payment reminders, deadline alerts
Bulk Operations: Mass updates, bulk imports
API Public: REST API for integrations

business-glossary.term: Ordem dos Advogados do Brasil (Bar Association)
